mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_NO, REVIEW_NO FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, STAGE_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE FROM REVIEWS JOIN MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GOODS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO GOODS ( GOODS_NO, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_SORT, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_PRICE, DELIVERY_COST, GOODS_SELLER, GOODS_INFO, GOODS_REG_DATE, GOODS_DEL_FL ) VALUES ( #{goodsNo}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsSort}, #{goodsCategory}, #{goodsPrice}, #{deliveryCost}, #{goodsSeller}, #{goodsInfo}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE GOODS SET GOODS_NAME = #{goodsName}, GOODS_SORT = #{goodsSort}, GOODS_CATEGORY = #{goodsCategory}, GOODS_PRICE = #{goodsPrice}, DELIVERY_COST = #{deliveryCost}, GOODS_SELLER = #{goodsSeller}, GOODS_INFO = #{goodsInfo} WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(GOODS_IMG_ORDER)), 0) FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo} AND GOODS_IMG_ORDER != '0'

SELECT G.GOODS_NO, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_SORT, G.GOODS_CATEGORY, G.GOODS_PRICE, G.DELIVERY_COST, G.GOODS_SELLER, GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH, GI.GOODS_IMG_RE, TO_CHAR(G.GOODS_REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GOODS_REG_DATE, G.GOODS_DEL_FL FROM GOODS G LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON G.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY G.GOODS_NO DESC

SELECT GOODS_NO, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_SORT, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_PRICE, DELIVERY_COST, GOODS_SELLER, GOODS_INFO, GOODS_DEL_FL, TO_CHAR(GOODS_REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GOODS_REG_DATE FROM GOODS WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo}
SELECT GOODS_IMG_NO, GOODS_NO, GOODS_IMG_PATH, GOODS_IMG_RE, GOODS_IMG_ORDER FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(GOODS_IMG_ORDER)
SELECT GOODS_OPTION_NO, GOODS_NO, GOODS_SIZE, GOODS_COLOR, STOCK FROM GOODS_OPTION WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo} ORDER BY GOODS_OPTION_NO
SELECT ORDER_NO, ORDER_ID, MEMBER_NO, ORDER_STATUS FROM TOTAL_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}

SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, UNVEILING_STATUS, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, TO_CHAR(FINISH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS FINISH_DATE FROM UNVEILING ORDER BY UNVEILING_NO DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT UNVEILING_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UNVEILING ( UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, PRODUCTION_YEAR, PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, PRODUCTION_SIZE, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, PRODUCTION_DETAIL, ARTIST_DETAIL, UNVEILING_STATUS, FINALIZED_FL, PAYMENT_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{unveilingNo}, #{unveilingTitle}, #{productionArtist}, #{productionYear}, #{productionMaterial}, #{productionSize}, #{startPrice}, #{startPrice}, 0, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{finishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), #{productionDetail}, #{artistDetail}, #{unveilingStatus}, 0, 'NONE' )
INSERT INTO UNVEILING_IMG ( UV_IMG_NO, UV_IMG_PATH, UV_IMG_ORDER, UNVEILING_NO ) VALUES ( UNVEILING_IMG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{thumbUrl}, 1, #{unveilingNo} )
